headlines.title_cn: 有人真心希望AI取代人类
headlines.title_en: The people who actually want AI to replace humanity
headlines.summary_cn: 文章探讨了部分技术专家和加速主义者为何积极推动AI取代人类，认为这是人类进化的必然步骤。这一思潮涉及技术奇点、超级智能等概念，值得关注其伦理与社会影响。
headlines.summary_en: Explores why some technologists and accelerationists actively advocate for AI replacing humanity, viewing it as an inevitable step in evolution. Touches on concepts like technological singularity and superintelligence, raising ethical and societal concerns.
headlines.student_note: 推荐阅读，思考AI终极目标的不同视角，有助于理解技术哲学争论。

headlines.title_cn: 取消AI订阅或许是解决方案
headlines.title_en: The solution might be cancelling my AI subscription
headlines.summary_cn: 作者反思AI订阅服务带来的依赖、成本和隐私问题，提出取消订阅可能是一种清醒的选择。文章鼓励用户评估实际需求，避免被AI工具捆绑。
headlines.summary_en: Reflects on the dependencies, costs, and privacy concerns of AI subscriptions, suggesting cancellation as a rational choice. Encourages users to assess real needs and avoid vendor lock-in.
headlines.student_note: 对管理数字消费和学习预算有启发，谨慎选择工具。

headlines.title_en: I Put a Datacenter GPU in My Gaming PC for £200
headlines.summary_cn: 一位极客用约200英镑购得旧款数据中心GPU，成功改装到自己的游戏电脑中，显著提升了AI推理性能。展示了低成本自建AI硬件方案的可行性。
headlines.summary_en: A hobbyist acquired an old datacenter GPU for ~£200 and modified it into a gaming PC, greatly boosting AI inference performance. Demonstrates a low-cost DIY approach to AI hardware.
headlines.student_note: 对动手能力强、想低成本入门AI加速的同学有参考价值。

headlines.title_cn: 航班因蓝牙名称触发警报返航
headlines.title_en: United Airlines 767 Returns to Newark After Bluetooth Name Sparks Alert
headlines.summary_cn: 美联航一架767因乘客蓝牙设备的名称触发安全警报，导致飞机起飞后返航检查。事件凸显现代航空安全系统对无线设备命名的敏感度。
headlines.summary_en: A United Airlines 767 returned to Newark after a passenger's Bluetooth device name triggered a security alert. Highlights the sensitivity of modern aviation safety systems to wireless device names.

headlines.title_cn: 领域专业知识才是真正的护城河
headlines.title_en: Domain expertise has always been the real moat
headlines.summary_cn: 文章指出，尽管AI能力日益强大，但深厚的行业知识、数据理解和业务洞察仍然是企业和个人不可替代的竞争优势。AI工具无法轻易取代人类专家的判断力。
headlines.summary_en: Argues that deep domain knowledge, data understanding, and business insight remain irreplaceable advantages despite AI's progress. AI tools cannot easily replicate human expert judgment.
headlines.student_note: 鼓励大学生深耕专业领域，结合AI工具形成复合竞争力。

items.title_en: The people who actually want AI to replace humanity

items.summary_en: A hobbyist acquired an old datacenter GPU for ~£200 and modified it into a gaming PC, greatly boosting AI inference performance. Demonstrates a low-cost DIY approach to AI hardware.

items.title_cn: 航班因蓝牙名称触发警报返航
items.title_en: United Airlines 767 Returns to Newark After Bluetooth Name Sparks Alert
items.summary_cn: 美联航一架767因乘客蓝牙设备的名称触发安全警报，导致飞机起飞后返航检查。事件凸显现代航空安全系统对无线设备命名的敏感度。
items.summary_en: A United Airlines 767 returned to Newark after a passenger's Bluetooth device name triggered a security alert. Highlights the sensitivity of modern aviation safety systems to wireless device names.

items.title_cn: 领域专业知识才是真正的护城河
items.title_en: Domain expertise has always been the real moat
items.summary_cn: 文章指出，尽管AI能力日益强大，但深厚的行业知识、数据理解和业务洞察仍然是企业和个人不可替代的竞争优势。AI工具无法轻易取代人类专家的判断力。
items.summary_en: Argues that deep domain knowledge, data understanding, and business insight remain irreplaceable advantages despite AI's progress. AI tools cannot easily replicate human expert judgment.
items.student_note: 鼓励大学生深耕专业领域，结合AI工具形成复合竞争力。

items.title_cn: Mistral AI Now 峰会要点记录
items.title_en: Notes from the Mistral AI Now Summit
items.summary_cn: 汇总Mistral AI峰会上的关键观点：开源模型的未来、多语言能力的重要性、企业级部署的挑战与机遇。强调了本地化AI方案在欧洲的兴起。
items.summary_en: Key takeaways from Mistral AI Summit: the future of open-source models, importance of multilingual capabilities, and challenges in enterprise deployment. Highlights the rise of localized AI in Europe.
items.student_note: 关注欧洲AI生态，了解开源模型最新发展方向。

items.summary_cn: AI模型路由平台OpenRouter完成1.13亿美元B轮融资，估值攀升。该公司统一多家AI模型API，提供智能路由和负载均衡，降低开发者接入成本。
items.summary_en: AI model routing platform OpenRouter raised $113M in Series B funding. It unifies multiple AI model APIs with intelligent routing and load balancing, reducing integration costs for developers.
items.student_note: 了解AI基础设施层创业趋势，对API经济感兴趣的同学可关注。

items.title_en: Show HN: Tiny-vLLM – high performance LLM inference engine in C++ and CUDA
items.summary_cn: 开源项目Tiny-vLLM提供用C++和CUDA编写的高性能大模型推理引擎，专注于低资源环境下的部署。支持量化、连续批处理等优化，代码简洁。
items.summary_en: Open-source Tiny-vLLM is a high-performance LLM inference engine written in C++ and CUDA, optimized for resource-constrained deployment. Supports quantization, continuous batching, with clean code.
items.student_note: 推荐阅读源码，学习LLM推理优化技术，适合系统方向学生。

items.title_cn: AI就业焦虑正引发技术人心理危机
items.title_en: AI job grief: A psychological crisis hitting tech workers
items.summary_cn: 随着AI自动化威胁传统技术岗位，大量技术工作者出现焦虑、迷茫和职业认同危机。文章呼吁企业和社会关注心理健康，并建议个人主动转型。
items.summary_en: As AI automation threatens traditional tech jobs, many tech workers experience anxiety, confusion, and identity crisis. Article urges attention to mental health and suggests proactive career transformation.
items.student_note: 提前思考职业规划，培养AI无法替代的能力（如复杂沟通、创造力）。

items.title_cn: Helios：估算英国任意地址光伏潜力
items.title_en: Show HN: Helios – what plug-in solar could generate for any address in Britain
items.summary_cn: Helios工具利用英国政府激光雷达数据，估算任意地址安装插件式太阳能板的发电量及电费节省。这类太阳能板无需电工安装，即将合法销售。
items.summary_en: Helios uses UK government LIDAR data to estimate solar generation and savings for any address, using plug-in solar panels that require no electrician and will soon be legally sold.
items.student_note: 展示如何结合开放数据与AI算法解决实际问题，值得学习方法论。

items.title_cn: 德皇与“平庸之人”的历史理论
items.title_en: The Kaiser and a "Mediocre Man" Theory of History
items.summary_cn: 探讨历史中“平庸之人”推动重大事件的“庸人理论”，以德国皇帝威廉二世为例，分析非杰出个体在历史进程中的关键作用。
items.summary_en: Explores the "mediocre man" theory of history, where ordinary individuals drive major events, using Kaiser Wilhelm II as a case study. Challenges the great-man historical narrative.

items.title_cn: Rotary GPU：有限显存下运行MoE模型
items.title_en: Rotary GPU: Exploring Local Execution for Large MoE Models Under Limited VRAM
items.summary_cn: 提出一种名为Rotary GPU的方法，通过局部执行和GPU间旋转调度，在显存受限的环境下运行大型混合专家（MoE）模型，避免昂贵的跨节点通信。
items.summary_en: Proposes Rotary GPU, a method using local execution and rotating GPU scheduling to run large Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models under limited VRAM, avoiding costly cross-node communication.
items.student_note: 了解MoE推理优化前沿，对分布式系统和大模型部署感兴趣的同学推荐阅读。

items.title_cn: 反射式提示调优：利用函数调用优化提示
items.title_en: Reflective Prompt Tuning through Language Model Function-Calling
items.summary_cn: 提出Reflective Prompt Tuning方法，利用大模型的函数调用能力自动反思和优化提示，减少人工调优成本。实验表明该方法显著提升复杂指令遵循能力。
items.summary_en: Introduces Reflective Prompt Tuning, which uses LLM function-calling to automatically reflect on and optimize prompts, reducing manual tuning. Experiments show significant improvement in complex instruction following.
items.student_note: 推荐阅读论文，学习提示工程自动化的最新思路。

items.title_cn: 视觉语言模型的空间表征探析
items.title_en: Why Far Looks Up: Probing Spatial Representation in Vision-Language Models
items.summary_cn: 通过设计最小对比对，研究视觉语言模型是否真正理解3D空间，还是依赖图像中的统计捷径。发现模型存在几何偏见，空间理解能力被高估。
items.summary_en: Constructs minimal contrastive pairs to probe whether VLMs truly understand 3D space or rely on statistical shortcuts. Reveals geometric biases and overestimated spatial reasoning capabilities.
items.student_note: 对模型可解释性和空间认知感兴趣的同学建议精读。

items.title_cn: CONF-KV：置信度感知的KV缓存管理
items.title_en: CONF-KV: Confidence-Aware KV Cache Eviction with Mixed-Precision Storage for Long-Horizon LLM
items.summary_cn: 提出CONF-KV方法，在长文本LLM推理中利用模型每步的置信度信号动态驱逐KV缓存，并配合混合精度存储，大幅降低显存占用和注意力计算成本。
items.summary_en: Proposes CONF-KV, which uses per-step confidence signals to dynamically evict KV cache and employs mixed-precision storage during long-context LLM inference, significantly reducing memory and attention costs.
items.student_note: 推荐作为LLM推理优化的重要参考，适合研究生和系统方向同学。
